original_image_tags: Circular ink stamp, partially illegible, appears to read "RECEIVED" at top, "OCT 26 1948" in center, and "DRAPVLICHED" or similar text at bottom.

elements.description: A faded circular stamp or seal located in the lower right area, partially obscured by typed text, with legible text including 'OCT 25 1948' and 'DISPATCHED'.

judge.reason: Both sides quote a stamp but give contradictory dates ('OCT 26 1948' vs 'OCT 25 1948') and contradictory bottom text ('DRAPVLICHED' vs 'DISPATCHED'), indicating at least one side is fabricating specific verbatim text.
